category_sources: source_facts.description says PFERD is a program for fast downloading of files; source_facts.homepage points to the official GitHub project.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is pferd; the official GitHub project uses the display name PFERD.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README and docs directory are the project documentation surfaces.
repo_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub project URL and source_facts.repo is empty.
tags_sources: source_facts.description describes fast file downloading; source_facts.executables lists the pferd CLI.
